## What this changes

<!-- Which entry (id) does this add or improve, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Adds/edits a single `issues/<id>.md` (id matches the filename)
- [ ] Has all four sections: Problem / Current mitigations / Open gaps / Watch (2027+)
- [ ] Claims are accurate; no fabricated statistics, paper titles, or numbers
- [ ] `npm run validate` and `npm run build` pass locally
